title: recaps
description: Community-authored, position-keyed 'story so far' recaps for one work. A per-work sidecar in the CC BY-SA layer, kept separate from the CC0 core.

through.description: The recap is safe to show once the listener has finished this chapter. A chapter-0 entry with scope 'series' is the 'previously, in earlier books' recap.

scope.description: Whether the recap covers only this book ('book') or also earlier books in the series ('series').

text.description: Own-words recap. Length-capped for the copyright reference-guide tier; verbatim/near-verbatim phrasing is a separate publish-pipeline check.

in_short.description: The whole book in one short own-words paragraph, ending included - the fastest possible refresher for someone about to start the next book.

ending.description: How the book ends - the closing state of the major players and any open threads, stated plainly (never a tease). Deliberately capped tighter than a chaptered recap entry: a crisp sequel-handoff, not another full recap.
